data.title: Crocs to invest $80 million in Las Vegas fulfillment center
data.description: Crocs was approved for $4.7 million in state tax abatements. In return, it has committed to creating 70 jobs over the next five years and an average hourly wage of $34.03.

data.title: Consumer spending helps extend growth streak in July Ecommerce Stock Index results
data.description: Beyond, Wayfair and eBay all saw double-digit gains in July, leading to the Ecommerce Stock Index's third consecutive month of in a row.

data.title: Stitch Fix details new AI features arriving to aid its human stylists
data.description: The features include a new conversational AI Style Assistant for Stitch Fix customers that is already live in the retailer's iOS app.

data.title: Distributor ARG Industrial rolls out mobile app to streamline ecommerce
data.description: The distributor expects the introduction of the app to improve operational efficiency in multiple ways, including centralizing inventory data and incorporating real-time tracking of orders to reduces miscommunication.

data.title: Furniture.com brings in firmly to simplify its platform's discovery process
data.description: Firmly, which earlier this year announced it was working with Perplexity, will bring its checkout technology to Furniture.com's shoppers.
